case_title: ALL CITY LOCKSMITH, INC. VS CIT FINANCIAL USA, INC. (CIT) et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALL CITY LOCKSMITH, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIT FINANCIAL USA, INC.  (CIT) NATL. PROCESSING MANAGEMENT GROUP (NPMG) $499.12 PRINCIPAL, $87.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $586.12, THE COURT CONFIRMS RECISSION OF THE AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT NATIONAL PROCESSING MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. DEFENDANT CIT FINANCIAL USA, INC. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
